title: ipomoea oreogena
intro: Ipomoea oreogena, also known as the mountain morning glory, is a type of flowering vine native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea oreogena include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, and can also be used topically as a poultice or ointment.
